llm_verdict.message:
I was unable to execute any commands on the host – every attempt to run `rpm`, `dnf`, or even a simple `true` returned exit code 255 with an SSH‑related error. Because the remote execution channel is non‑functional, I cannot verify whether the **vsftpd** package is installed, cannot perform the required dependency check, nor can I remove the package or confirm the remediation with a final OpenSCAP scan.

At this point the remediation cannot be completed until the command execution issue is resolved.
